name: GAYA Fitness and Pilates Studio (Branch 1 - Chaiyaphruek 2)
addressFull: 302, Chaiyaphruek 2 area, Nong Prue, Bang Lamung, Chon Buri 20150
hours: Daily 08:00-20:00; an April 2026 operator post advertises 24/7 cardio access for private-training clients

membership.contract: Operator advertises no long-term contract for the three-session private offer

praise: Thai reviewers describe a clean, private studio with varied machines and kind trainers.
One review says clients purchasing trainer hours can use cardio equipment without an additional membership fee.

sources.label: Google Maps exact branch identity and reviews

identityNote: The current Branch 1 coordinate and phone were kept separate from Gaya Wellness Studio, which has a different coordinate but the same phone.
